description.ko: 에메랄드빛 막과 황금빛 넥타를 통해 빛과 생명이 흐르는 심해 유기적 건축물로, 리듬감 있게 호흡하는 생태계를 표현합니다.
description.en: A deep-sea organic architecture where light and life flow through emerald membranes and golden nectar, creating a rhythmic, breathing ecosystem.

prompt: An ultra-detailed cinematic 3D render of AURA-7, titled 'The Biomorphic Labyrinth.' A vast, pulsating network of #7FB069 emerald-green mossy membranes and #2D5A3D dark forest-green vascular structures, resembling a living, breathing cathedral. The structure is submerged in a weightless #E6F2E1 pearlescent fluid, with #FFE66D golden bioluminescent nectar flowing through semi-permeable walls like liquid electricity. Macro cinematography focuses on the microscopic vibrations of translucent capillary systems and golden sap exchange. Rendered in Octane with hyper-realistic fluid dynamics, volumetric light shafts, and extreme soft focus bokeh. 8k resolution, serene and divine movement.
